inputs.text: Main thakawat mehsoos kar rahi hoon, bukhar bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely due to absence of specific symptoms

inputs.text: Mere bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard bhi hai aur kabz ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever

inputs.text: Ab toh tez bukhar ho raha hai, kabz ke baad dast ho gayi hai aur mujhe bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely due to presence of high fever and constipation followed by diarrhea

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely due to absence of typical malaria symptoms

inputs.text: Main bahut thak gayi hoon, bukhar abhi bhi hai aur pet mein bahut dard ho raha hai
